score_evidence.completeness: All required fields present: required_documents (array with name, rationale, received), request_sent_at, current_status, blockers. Topo always required — present. Soil mechanics study present (correct for 2,000m² public building). Municipal title/land use authorization present (appropriate for government project). Seed data states 'flat municipal land, no hydrology concerns' — hydrologic study correctly omitted. Score 5.
score_evidence.accuracy: Document requirements precisely match site conditions: flat land → topo yes, hydrologic study N/A; public building 2,000m² → soil study required for structural engineering; government land → municipal title authorization. No over-requesting, no under-requesting. Score 5.
score_evidence.clarity: Instructions sent (request_sent_at confirmed). Rationale for each document is documented. Score 4 (not 5): no deadline specified in required_documents entries — client would need follow-up to know when documents are due.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 (simulated run — ASANA_UNAVAILABLE). current_status=documents_requested logged. Live Asana update not confirmed.
score_evidence.timing: Request sent at 2026-03-17T17:00:00-07:00 — same day as lead intake, parallel track with area program. Score 5.
score_evidence.decision_readiness: Score 4: current_status=documents_requested, blockers=[] (empty). Vera can see document status, but all three documents show received=false — the report accurately reflects that no documents have been received yet. Vera can assess status but cannot confirm site_docs_complete. State is correct for this stage of the pipeline.

decision_commentary: Solid site readiness report. Correct documents identified for flat municipal land / public building context. Hydrologic study correctly omitted per site conditions. Two minor gaps: no delivery deadline specified for client, and no Asana live sync (simulated run). No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: Sol operates in parallel with Ana (Segment C). No separate Celia gate for site readiness — feeds DG-03 via Vera's parallel track.
